_comment: Full granular Project Atlas agent catalog (spec §3, §3.7, §8.2, §9.8, §10.2). Consumed by generate.py to emit agents/<id>/SOUL.md + skills/<skill>/SKILL.md, and by deploy.sh. The 7 hand-authored swarm/executive agents (chief-editor, knowledge-graph, ds-star, trend-intelligence, research-factcheck, narrative-psychology, commerce-design) are defined separately and act as coordinators over these granular workers.

agents.name: Trend Discovery
agents.purpose: Continuously discover rising topics, personalities, events and discussions.
agents.inputs: Google Trends, YouTube, Reddit, News, Wikipedia, Podcasts, Quora (fetched/cleaned via Jina Reader)

agents.name: Demand Forecast
agents.purpose: Predict whether a topic will matter next week, month or quarter.

agents.name: Coverage Gap
agents.purpose: Find high-demand, low-content-supply opportunities.
agents.inputs: Search volume + content supply data (Brave + Exa)

agents.name: Personality Discovery
agents.purpose: Find athletes, leaders, entrepreneurs, philosophers, scientists, reformers, commanders across categories.

agents.name: Hidden Legends
agents.purpose: Find unknown but fascinating people with extraordinary stories before they go mainstream.
agents.inputs: Biography sources, Wikipedia gap analysis (Exa, Books, Archives)
agents.note: LLM-dependent: judging story-quality of a newly mined source is not reducible to a statistic (spec §3.7).

agents.name: Personality Graph
agents.purpose: Build the relationship graph for each person: relationships, psychology, rivalries, failures, successes, mentors, legacy.

agents.name: Story Atomizer
agents.purpose: Transform one personality into dozens to hundreds of distinct story angles (leadership, failure, psychology, rivalries, relationships, communication).

agents.name: Psychological Arc
agents.purpose: Extract identity, struggle, failure, growth, leadership, resilience, reinvention, legacy.

agents.name: Cultural Context
agents.purpose: Determine why this person mattered at that specific moment in history/society.

agents.name: Human Meaning
agents.purpose: Answer why people cared, what need was satisfied, what lesson exists today — turning facts into psychology/leadership/identity content.

agents.name: Archetype
agents.purpose: Map personalities to archetypes: rebel, warrior, builder, visionary, teacher, strategist, underdog, survivor.

agents.name: Audience Mapping
agents.purpose: Identify segments: students, professionals, entrepreneurs, managers, athletes, history lovers, etc.

agents.name: Geographic Intelligence
agents.purpose: Calculate India / US / Europe / Australia relevance scores.

agents.name: Engagement Prediction
agents.purpose: Predict CTR, watch time, comments and shares before production.

agents.name: Playlist Intelligence
agents.purpose: Organize stories into content universes / playlists (e.g. Sports Psychology, Leadership Psychology).

agents.name: Hook
agents.purpose: Generate curiosity, contrarian, emotional and authority hooks for the first 3 seconds.

agents.name: Narrative
agents.purpose: Structure script as Hook → Conflict → Escalation → Resolution → Lesson.

agents.name: Vibe
agents.purpose: Select emotional tone/style: epic, mysterious, dark, emotional, hopeful, motivational, intellectual, dramatic.

agents.name: Script
agents.purpose: Generate shorts, reels, long-form video, podcast and blog scripts.
agents.note: Production host is Modal (Gemma fine-tuned), spec §11.1. Runs on deepseek here until Gemma endpoint exists.

agents.name: Voice Director
agents.purpose: Choose narration voice, pace, energy and emotion per channel/persona.

agents.name: Asset Planner
agents.purpose: Determine B-roll, music, images, and templates; query Envato Elements MCP; generate Google Veo and Higgsfield AI prompts for visual gaps; construct HeyGen presenter inputs.

agents.name: Thumbnail
agents.purpose: Generate thumbnail concepts and image-generation prompts.

agents.name: Fact Verification
agents.purpose: Verify dates, claims, statistics and sources before publishing; content-safety pass for demonetization triggers.
agents.note: Conditional cross-model check on real-person/culture claims via Gemini (spec §11.3).

agents.name: Retention
agents.purpose: Identify weak intros, slow sections and drop-off points before upload.

agents.name: Merch Opportunity
agents.purpose: Detect topics suitable for merchandise (e.g. Stoicism, Wrestling, Leadership).

agents.name: Product Discovery
agents.purpose: Identify specific products: posters, journals, shirts, digital products, courses.

agents.name: Regional Culture
agents.purpose: Determine India / USA / Europe / Australia product preferences.

agents.name: Revenue Optimization
agents.purpose: Predict RPM, affiliate, merch and sponsorship potential.

agents.name: Story Opportunity Intelligence
agents.purpose: Final gatekeeper above all agents: decide if a personality is worth covering, estimate whether it can generate 50+ stories, identify which audiences/countries care, assess YouTube saturation, shareability and retention likelihood.

agents.name: Ad Revenue Optimization
agents.purpose: Maximize ad RPM within each video without harming retention: recommend mid-roll count/placement by length, flag advertiser-unfriendly content, track YPP/Shorts eligibility, monitor RPM by niche/geography.

agents.name: Affiliate Management
agents.purpose: Turn every relevant story into a trackable affiliate placement: select program per story/archetype, generate and rotate tracked links, insert into descriptions/pinned comments/cards, A/B test, reconcile weekly. Affiliate insertion is a publish-blocking gate (spec §8.11).

agents.name: Sponsorship Matching
agents.purpose: Build a repeatable brand-deal pipeline: match archetype/audience to advertiser categories, maintain a CRM pipeline (prospect→outreach→negotiation→delivered→paid), track rate benchmarks by view tier.

agents.name: Owned Audience
agents.purpose: Decouple revenue from platform risk: manage CTA placement for email/Discord/Telegram capture, run lead magnets (guides, archetype quizzes), segment subscribers by archetype interest.

agents.name: Community Monetization
agents.purpose: Convert engaged viewers into recurring revenue: manage memberships, Patreon-equivalent tiers, paid courses/digital products; track churn and LTV.

agents.name: Thumbnail/Title CTR
agents.purpose: Maximize click-through from cold impressions: generate and A/B test thumbnail/title variants, track CTR by archetype/personality, feed winning patterns back to the Thumbnail agent.

agents.name: Posting Schedule
agents.purpose: Enforce consistent cadence across platforms: maintain the publish calendar against §9.4 targets, flag gaps before they break momentum, coordinate Shorts/Reels timing with long-form.

agents.name: Community Engagement
agents.purpose: Drive comment-stage engagement signals: draft and schedule timely replies to early comments, surface high-signal questions to Coverage Gap, monitor comment sentiment for safety flags.

agents.name: Collaboration Outreach
agents.purpose: Build a creator-to-creator growth channel: identify adjacent creators by archetype/audience overlap, manage outreach pipeline (reusing the Sponsorship CRM pattern), track collab vs solo performance.

agents.name: Merch Task Brief
agents.purpose: Convert a detected merch opportunity into a concrete, designer-ready brief: product type, theme, archetype, target region, key motif, and a hard deadline tied to the event's relevance window; flag time-sensitive vs evergreen.
agents.inputs: Merch Opportunity + Product Discovery + event/festival/trend calendars

agents.name: Designer Assignment
agents.purpose: Route briefs to the right available human designer by skill tag, workload and past performance; balance queue depth; escalate unassigned time-sensitive briefs before their window closes.

agents.name: Submission Review
agents.purpose: Gate submissions and manifests: check against brief/script, run IP pass, enforce Envato incorporation (merch), and verify elements licenses in envato_asset_references (videos).
agents.note: Cross-model check via Gemini for IP/originality (spec §11.3).

agents.name: Upload
agents.purpose: Publish approved, human-created artwork to Redbubble and other POD platforms under correct human-creator disclosure; apply product type, tags, pricing; enforce FTC affiliate + AI disclosure gates; log the live listing URL.
